title: Hobby Finder Quiz
description: Rate each statement from 1 (not at all) to 5 (very much).

questions.text: Do you enjoy meeting new people?
Do you enjoy working in a team?
Do you enjoy spending your free time with other people?
Do you enjoy learning new things?
Do you enjoy seeing yourself improve?
Do you enjoy being in nature?
Do you enjoy spending time alone?
Do you enjoy expressing your identity and interests?
Do you enjoy expressing your abilities and skills?
